name: computer
description: A spatial computing object. A computer IS a world — nested inside the parent world with its own dworld:// address, surface, and agent endpoint. Enter it with MSG_ENTER using its URI.

fields.name: object_id
fields.description: Entity ID of this computer body in the parent world

fields.name: uri
fields.description: dworld:// address — send ENTER here to get its SpatialManifest

fields.name: power
fields.description: Whether the computer is powered on

fields.name: program_uri
fields.description: URI of the currently running program (WASM, container, etc.)

fields.name: screen_hash
fields.description: FNV32 of current screen state — clients re-request display_frame on change
